text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Once again, my teacher is gracing me with
their time and love in the form of...
supplementary lessons!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That makes two months in a row! For them to
devote so much time to me, I must truly be a
genius!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Their expectations for me must reach the
ceiling—No! They must reach far beyond the
atmosphere itself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I must give today my all! Bakushin,
Bakushiiin!
